home.three_things_title: Three things your phone should do for you
home.three_things_subtitle: FoneClaw handles the everyday phone tasks that take too much of your time.
home.daily_brief_desc: Summarize SMS, notifications, and system info by contact and time. Know what matters without scrolling through each app one by one.
home.phone_health_desc: Check battery, storage, network, and permission risks in one voice report. No more digging through Android settings.
home.passive_triggers_desc: Take a screenshot or photo in supported Android workflows, and FoneClaw can offer a summary when context is available. No context switch needed.

features.commands_subtitle: Each command maps to a visible phone result: health report, summary, setting change, screenshot understanding, location, or navigation.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy - FoneClaw
privacy.description: FoneClaw privacy policy: how we collect, use, and protect your personal data.

cookie.title: Cookie Policy - FoneClaw
cookie.description: How FoneClaw uses cookies and similar technologies on our website.

not_found.title: Page Not Found
not_found.desc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

privacy.desc: How FoneClaw collects, uses, and protects your personal data.
privacy.s1_body: FoneClaw collects minimal data necessary to provide voice-controlled phone automation. This includes voice commands processed locally on your device, app usage patterns stored only on your device for learning preferences, and optional cloud processing data that is encrypted and deleted immediately after use. We do not collect browsing history, contacts, or message content.
privacy.s2_body: We use collected information solely to provide and improve FoneClaw services. Voice commands are processed to execute your requested actions. Usage patterns help us personalize your experience. We never sell your data to third parties or use it for advertising purposes.
privacy.s3_body: Your data is stored locally on your device by default. When cloud processing is enabled for specific features, data is encrypted in transit and at rest using industry-standard AES-256 encryption. Cloud data is automatically deleted within 24 hours of processing.
privacy.s4_body: FoneClaw integrates with third-party services (Google Maps, Spotify, etc.) only when you explicitly authorize them. Each integration follows the respective service privacy policy. We do not share your data between third-party services.
privacy.s5_body: You have the right to access, modify, or delete your personal data at any time. You can export your data, opt out of cloud processing, or delete your account entirely through the FoneClaw settings menu.
privacy.s6_body: FoneClaw is not intended for children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe a child has provided us with personal data, please contact us immediately.
privacy.s7_body: We may update this privacy policy periodically. Significant changes will be communicated through the FoneClaw app and website. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy.s8_body: For privacy-related questions or concerns, contact us at privacy@foneclaw.ai. We respond to all privacy inquiries within 48 hours.

cookie.desc: How FoneClaw uses cookies and similar technologies on our website.
cookie.s1_body: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit our website. They help us provide you with a better browsing experience by remembering your preferences and understanding how you use our site.
cookie.s2_body: We use several types of cookies on our website: essential cookies for site functionality, analytics cookies to understand visitor behavior, and preference cookies to remember your language and display settings.
cookie.s3_body: These cookies are necessary for the website to function properly. They enable core features like page navigation, secure area access, and language selection. The website cannot function properly without these cookies.
cookie.s4_body: We use Google Analytics to understand how visitors interact with our website. These cookies collect information such as pages visited, time spent on the site, and traffic sources. This data helps us improve our content and user experience. Google Analytics data is aggregated and anonymous.
cookie.s5_body: Some cookies are placed by third-party services that appear on our pages, such as Google Analytics. We do not control these cookies. Please refer to the respective third-party privacy policies for more information about their cookie practices.
cookie.s6_body: You can control and manage cookies through your browser settings. Most browsers allow you to block or delete cookies. However, disabling essential cookies may affect website functionality. You can also use our cookie consent banner to manage your preferences.
cookie.s7_body: Session cookies are deleted when you close your browser. Persistent cookies remain on your device for a set period or until you delete them. Our analytics cookies have a maximum retention period of 26 months.
cookie.s8_body: For questions about our cookie policy, contact us at privacy@foneclaw.ai.

author.title: Dean - Senior Android Engineer & FoneClaw Founder
author.desc: Dean is a senior Android systems engineer and founder of FoneClaw. Read his articles about AI agents, voice control, and mobile automation.
author.bio_short: Building the future of voice-controlled Android phones. Passionate about AI agents, mobile automation, and making technology accessible to everyone.
author.about_p1: Dean is a senior Android systems engineer with over 10 years of experience in mobile development. He has deep expertise in Android internals, system-level programming, and mobile automation.
author.about_p2: After years of working with major Android projects, Dean founded FoneClaw to solve a fundamental problem: why can't you control your phone entirely by voice? Traditional voice assistants can set timers and play music, but they cannot navigate apps, fill forms, or chain multi-step tasks together.
author.about_p3: FoneClaw is the result of Dean's vision for a true AI agent on Android — one that reads your screen, understands your intent, and physically interacts with your phone to get things done. No APIs required, no developer partnerships needed. Just pure voice control over any Android app.
author.no_articles: No articles available in this language yet.
